SkillDescAnalyze: Read-only audit for complexity, query patterns, and performance hotspots.
SkillDescCodeReview: Review code against coding standards, naming rules, and structure expectations.
SkillDescCodingConventions: Apply coding standards as you write code: naming, placement, readability, SOLID, and size limits.
SkillDescOptimize: Find and fix bottlenecks, redundant loops, and high-complexity code paths.
SkillDescCommit: Guided Git workflow for pull, commit splitting, conflict handling, and push.
SkillDescS3Download: S3 upload, download, delete, attachment, and signed URL patterns.

McpDescription: Connect external tools to Claude Code via MCP servers and plugins.
PluginNeedsLoginBody: A terminal will open shortly with Claude. Complete the login steps, then try again.
PluginAuthHint: Run /mcp in Claude Code to authenticate after install
PluginClaudeCodeSetupDesc: Analyzes your codebase and recommends tailored Claude Code automations — hooks, skills, MCP servers, subagents — configured for your project.
PluginClaudeSecurityDesc: Deep vulnerability scanning of your own code inside Claude Code at a chosen effort tier; every finding is challenged before reporting, then turned into verified, targeted patches.
PluginSkillCreatorDesc: Create new skills, improve existing ones, and measure skill performance — scaffold from scratch, optimize, and run evals with variance analysis.
PluginFrontendDesignDesc: UI/UX design assistance and component generation
PluginCodeReviewDesc: Automated code review and quality checks
PluginCodeSimplifierDesc: Simplify complex code and reduce complexity
PluginSecurityGuidanceDesc: Security best practices and vulnerability detection
PluginTypescriptLspDesc: TypeScript language server for diagnostics and completions
McpTestRetry: Check the credentials and try again.
McpFormProjectKeyHint: e.g. PROJ — leave empty for all projects
McpRemoveConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this integration?
McpAuthHint: Run /mcp in Claude Code to authenticate
McpGuideLoadFailed: Guide content could not be loaded.

RsDescription: Enable VS Code tweaks, shell aliases, and right-click context menus for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and VS Code.
RsVsSticky: VS Code: Disable Terminal Sticky Scroll
RsVsChatAi: VS Code: Disable AI Chat Features
RsCtxClaude: Context Menu: Open in Claude Code
RsCtxCodex: Context Menu: Open in Codex CLI
RsCtxVscode: Context Menu: Open in VS Code
RsRestartConfirmBody: Context-menu changes only become visible after Nautilus is fully restarted. Closing the Files window leaves a background daemon with the old entries cached. Restart Nautilus now?
RsRestartFailed: Could not restart the file manager
RsNothingAvailable: No tweaks can be applied on this system. Install VS Code, Claude Code or Codex CLI to see the matching options here.
RsPyNautilusNeedInstall: The 'python3-nautilus' package is required for Nautilus right-click integration. Install it now (sudo prompt will appear)?
PluginCsharpLspDesc: C# language server (Roslyn-based csharp-ls): completion, real-time diagnostics, symbol navigation and refactoring for .NET / .NET Framework projects.
PluginMicrosoftDocsDesc: Direct access to learn.microsoft.com — semantic search across Azure, .NET, Windows docs, full-page markdown, code samples. No more API hallucinations.
PluginMcpServerDevDesc: Guided workflow for designing and building MCP servers. Covers deployment models, tool design patterns, auth, and MCPB packaging for distribution.
PluginLearningOutputStyleDesc: Pauses at key decision points and asks YOU to write the code instead of handing over a full solution. Turns coding sessions into hands-on learning.
PluginSessionReportDesc: Generates an explorable HTML report of your Claude Code usage — tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills used, and most expensive prompts.
PluginPlaygroundDesc: Generates self-contained single-file HTML playgrounds with visual controls and live preview. Six templates: Design, Data, Concept Map, Critique, Diff, Code Map.
PluginHookifyDesc: Define behavioural guardrails for Claude using plain markdown — block dangerous commands, debug code in production, hardcoded credentials. No coding required.
PluginClaudeMdManagementDesc: Audit and maintain CLAUDE.md files. Skill scans the repo and grades quality; the /revise-claude-md command captures session learnings into project memory.
PluginFeatureDevDesc: Structured 7-phase feature workflow — codebase exploration, architecture design, implementation, quality review. Three specialised agents drive the steps.
UpdateAvailableMsg: A newer version of AI Tool is available.
UpdateSudoLabel: Your computer password (sudo) is required to install
UpdateManualMsg: Download the new version from the releases page.
UpdateDevMode: Update check is disabled in development.
UpdateUpToDate: You are on the latest version.
PluginPonytailDesc: Guides the agent toward minimal, practical code via a decision ladder — skip needless features, reuse code, prefer native APIs. ~54% less code, same safety. Modes: lite/full/ultra/off.
